description: Additional authentication information for MTLS source getting information from Google Workspace.  You will need a Google Cloud service account with domain-wide delegation enabled in the Google Workspace Admin console, granted the admin.directory.user.readonly and admin.directory.group.readonly scopes.

clientEmail.description: The email of the service account used to call the Directory API.
clientEmail.title: clientEmail

privateKeyID.description: The identifier of the service account private key.
privateKeyID.title: privateKeyID

subject.description: The email of the Google Workspace administrator to impersonate when calling the Directory API. This is required for domain-wide delegation.
subject.title: subject

title: MTLSSourceGoogle
